tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT && iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT && iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers | sed -n '1,12p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 8853 -d 2033.0.113.1 -j REJECT && iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -jj REJECT && iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers | sed -n '1,12p'
Chain OUTPUT (policy ACCEPT)
num  target     prot opt source               destination         
1    REJECT     6    --  0.0.0.0/0            203.0.113.1          tcp dpt:8853 reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
2    REJECT     17   --  0.0.0.0/0            203.0.113.1          udp dpt:8853 reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo LAN_PING_OK; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo HTTP_OK; (echo >/dev/udp/203.0.113.1/8853) >/dev/null 2>&1; echo DNS8853_TEST_DONE"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo LLAN_PING_OK; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo HTTP_OK;  (echo >/dev/udp/203.0.113.1/8853) >/dev/null 2>&1; echo DNS8853_TEST_DONE
LAN_PING_OK
